\tzpentry{ID5267}{Batch Phase Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5267 introduces Batch Phase Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
$$\dot\varphi\_i \= \omega\_i \+ \frac{1}{N}\sum\_j K\_{ij}\sin(\varphi\_j-\varphi\_i) \+ \eta\_i(t).$$
